summary: Complete E2E testing of TrendScout Image Intelligence System. All features verified working: (1) Backend: Image serving from /api/images/ with correct JPEG content-type, POST /api/images/enrich/{product_id} (auth required), POST /api/images/batch-enrich (admin only), gallery_images field in public APIs. (2) Frontend: Landing page with hero/How It Works/Products/Pricing, Trending Products with filters/sort/cards showing score/confidence/stage badges, Product Detail with image carousel (thumbnails), hover zoom effect (group-hover:scale-110), click-to-zoom modal.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/images/{filename} returns 200 with content-type: image/jpeg
Backend: GET /api/images/nonexistent.jpg returns 404
Backend: POST /api/images/enrich/{product_id} requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/images/enrich/{product_id} returns {primary_image, gallery} for valid product
Backend: POST /api/images/enrich/invalid-id returns 404
Backend: POST /api/images/batch-enrich requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/images/batch-enrich returns {enriched, failed} for admin user
Backend: GET /api/public/trending-products returns gallery_images field in products
Backend: GET /api/public/product/magnetic-phone-mount returns gallery_images array
Backend: GET /api/public/product/magnetic-phone-mount returns growth_rate (numeric)
Backend: GET /api/public/product/magnetic-phone-mount returns tiktok_views (numeric)
Backend: Enriched images in gallery are servable from /api/images/
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero section, How It Works, Winning Products (6 cards), Built For, Pricing
Frontend: /trending-products shows category filter (21 categories)
Frontend: /trending-products has sort dropdown (5 options)
Frontend: /trending-products Filters button expands margin filter panel
Frontend: Product cards show score badge, confidence badge (Emerging Opportunity/Experimental), stage badge (Rising)
Frontend: Product cards show margin %, supplier cost (£), retail price (£), growth rate
Frontend: /trending/magnetic-phone-mount shows image gallery with thumbnails (2 images)
Frontend: Image gallery has carousel navigation arrows (prev/next)
Frontend: Image has hover zoom effect (group-hover:scale-110, cursor-pointer)
Frontend: Click on image opens zoom modal
Frontend: Zoom modal shows enlarged image with close button and navigation
Frontend: Breadcrumb navigation back to /trending-products works
Frontend: Confidence badge displays (Experimental for score 39)
Frontend: Metrics grid shows Launch Score, Margin, Est. Retail, Supplier Cost

test_credentials.note: Admin user with is_admin=true in profile

seed_data_creation: None - used existing enriched product 'magnetic-phone-mount' with gallery_images
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image intelligence system fully tested: (1) 30+ images stored in /app/backend/static/images/. (2) Images served via /api/images/{filename} with correct content-type. (3) Image enrichment endpoints fixed - were defined after app.include_router, now work correctly. (4) batch-enrich requires admin check from profile collection. (5) Product 'magnetic-phone-mount' has 2 gallery images. (6) Frontend ImageGallery component supports carousel, thumbnails, hover zoom (group-hover:scale-110), click-to-zoom modal. (7) gallery_images field returned in GET /api/public/product/{slug}.

fixes_applied.issue: Image endpoints /api/images/enrich and /api/images/batch-enrich returning 'Method Not Allowed'
fixes_applied.root_cause: Routes were defined AFTER app.include_router(api_router), and used @api_router decorator which conflicts with /api/images static mount
fixes_applied.fix: Changed to @app.post('/api/images/...') and placed BEFORE app.mount for static files

fixes_applied.root_cause: Code was using user.get('is_admin') but user is AuthenticatedUser object, not dict
fixes_applied.fix: Query profile from database using user.user_id to check is_admin flag

Image Serving.details: Returns JPEG images with correct content-type, 404 for non-existent

Image Enrichment API.details: Requires auth, returns {primary_image, gallery} with local URLs

Image Carousel UI.details: Thumbnails strip, prev/next arrows, dot indicators in modal

Click-to-Zoom Modal.details: Full-screen modal with enlarged image, close button, navigation

Landing Page.details: Hero, How It Works, Winning Products (6 cards), Built For, Pricing sections

Trending Products Page.details: 21 category filters, 5 sort options, margin filter panel, enhanced cards

Product Detail Page.details: Breadcrumb, image gallery, confidence badge, metrics grid, overview card, CTA

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints return real data from MongoDB and local image storage
